title: YOS MPM BUS Packet Schema
description: Specialized BUS packet schema for MPM domain — Mega Prompt packets transported via BUS.

bus_packet_id.description: Unique BUS packet ID. Format: BUS-MPM-{YYYYMMDD}-{MP_ID_SLUG}

mp_id.description: MPM packet ID. Format: MPM-{YYYYMMDD}-{SLUG} or MPC-/MPX-/MPG-/MPP-{YYYYMMDD}-{SLUG}

risk_flags.description: Risk flags. Non-empty = micro-menu required before execution.

mpm_payload_kind.description: How the MP content is delivered.

payload.description: MP content inline or pointer to it.

canonical_mp_path.description: Canonical path in YOS Git for this MP. e.g. 01_BACKBONE/MPM/04_QUEUE/ready/MPM-xxx.md

expected_mpr_path.description: Expected MPR path after execution. e.g. 01_BACKBONE/MPM/06_REPORTS/awaiting-review/MPM-xxx-REPORT.md

auto_run_eligible.description: True if this MP can auto-run without micro-menu (requires risk_flags empty and exactly one ready).
